violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean inside big ice machine.--Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean upper compartment of prep cooler.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean all shelving in kitchen.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc… were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors are in poor repair in kitchen and storage area and also need cleaned more thoroughly.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
